name: Internal Hostels
description: Located inside DEDAN KIMATHI UNIVERSITY MAIN CAMPUS,It is the government policy that admissions into public universities should not pegged on available accommodation space. Of about 7000 students, the University can barely accommodate 152 ladies and 246 men, making the total available spaces to be 398. The Directorate of Students' Welfare (DSW)  is tasked with the allocation process.Allocation is based on students with special conditions such as medical, disability, physical challenges etc. are also considered
Kimathi Student Centre has rooms with single bed, double deckers, two twin beds, three twin beds, four twin beds,and partitioned rooms for two beds.4,500 per person sharing & 9,000 Single Occupancy.
name: KIMATHI STUDENT CENTRE

description: Fully furnished room (Kitchen with necessary cookingappliances and kitchen accessories, Living area, study table,chair, tv, a bed with a mattress and bedding.) and free Wifi.Kshs. 20,000 p.m,Refundable Deposit of Kshs.5,000,Kshs.1,300 per day
name: Grace Hostel
MT Kenya Hostels
description: Nestled in a quiet suburban neighborhood, this hostel offers a peaceful study environment while still being accessible to campus.

name: Maisha Hostels
description: Modern accommodations designed for tech students, with high-speed internet and dedicated study spaces.

13 mins walk from DeKUT.
Has a kitchen balcony and spacious if you want to live with a roomate
name: La Duvet Hostels

description: Contemporary urban living with easy access to public transportation. Ideal for students who need to commute to different campus locations.

name: Kagumba Villas
description: Own compound, Fully furnished self-contained rooms. Shared Kitchen with necessary cooking appliances and kitchen accessories, Shared Living area with TV and fireplace, laundry services at a fee, WiFi. Other Amenities: Security Guards D & N, Full time Caretaker.

name: Rawin Homes
description: Fully furnished 1 bedroom house, Living area, fully furnished kitchen, Daily cleaning of the room, Linen is changed twice a week, Shared kitchen with a fridge, A sitting room with a tv and Wi-Fi, Food delivery on request Secure location.

name: Ace House
description: Own Compound - Seated on 1/2 Acre, Well Manicured Lawns. 2 Spacious Bedrooms. All Ensuite. 2 Full Baths, 1 Guest Washroom, 55" Smart TV with Netflix and Chromecast., High Speed WiFi, Living Area, Furnished Kitchen, Company Night Guard, Full-Time Caretaker, Chef Available on Request. Outside Hangout Area, Nyama Choma Grill, Fully equipped gym, Solar Heated Pool, Pet Friendly, Exterior security cameras.

name: Tazama Place
description: Fully furnished two-bedroom apartment - Shared kitchen with a fridge - A common sitting room with a tv and Wi-Fi - Electric kettles, cutlery and crockery are provided - Cleaning is done after every three days.

name: Mpeta House
description: Fully furnished 1 and 2 bedrooms - Daily cleaning of the room - Linen is changed twice a week - Shared kitchen with a fridge - A common sitting room with a tv and Wi-Fi - Restaurant - Electric kettles, cutlery and crockery are provided - Security.

name: Kirathimo Apartments
description: Fully furnished two-bedroom apartment - Shared kitchen with a fridge - A common sitting room with a tv and Wi-Fi - Electric kettles, cutlery and crockery are provided - Cleaning of rooms done on arrangements with the caretaker at a fee.

name: Valley view Hostels
description: A cozy and well-organized self-contained unit offering a comfortable living space, with a sleeping area, kitchenette, and private bathroom. It is a simple yet convenient home choice, ideal for someone looking for privacy, comfort, and easy living.

name: KWA KIMANI
description:
Electricity is only 150 per month unlimited usage with free wifi and water
Environment is quite and peaceful so even though there is no CCTV cameras or watchman,you are completely safe

name: EMMA
description:
This is a rental house close to DeKUT
The room is not furnished hence you must bring your own furnitures like bed,chair and table

name: OSERIAN
description: Has the best WIFI in Nyeri, with the place being good for someone who wants peace and comfort.The host is friendly.

name: EDGE VIEW
description: Very cool and modern place that accommodates DeKUT students and aviation students from nyaribo airstrip.

name: MAMA KEN
description:
More of rental place 
They offer beds

description:
For 5,000 you get to live solo.
No wifi 
Kind of small but perfect if you want privacy and staying alone
